phrases.intent_en: Ask how to navigate the caruggi
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come ci si orienta nei caruggi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh chee see oh-ree-EN-tah nay kah-ROOD-jee?
phrases.cultural_note: The caruggi are Genoa's UNESCO-listed medieval lanes — the widest is barely two metres across.

responses.english: Follow the smell of the sea — it leads to the port.
responses.phonetic: see SEH-gweh eel proh-FOO-moh del MAH-reh — POR-tah al POR-toh.
responses.french: Si segue il profumo del mare — porta al porto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat traditional Ligurian focaccia
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove trovo la focaccia genovese migliore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh TROH-voh lah foh-KAT-chah jeh-noh-VEH-zeh meel-YOH-reh?
phrases.cultural_note: Genoese focaccia is thicker and oilier than other varieties — look for panifici (bakeries) open from early morning.

responses.english: At Priano's, on Via San Vincenzo, right away.
responses.phonetic: dah pree-AH-noh, een VEE-ah san veen-CHEN-tsoh, SOO-bee-toh.
responses.french: Da Priano, in Via San Vincenzo, subito.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Piazza De Ferrari is

responses.english: Exit the lanes to the east — it's the main square.
responses.phonetic: EH-skah dai kah-ROOD-jee VER-soh est, eh lah PYAHT-tsah preen-chee-PAH-leh.
responses.french: Esca dai caruggi verso est, è la piazza principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes to the port
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quale autobus porta al porto?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAH-leh ow-toh-BOOS POR-tah al POR-toh?

responses.phonetic: eel noo-MEH-roh treh-DEE-chee, fer-MAH-tah kwee vee-CHEE-noh.
responses.french: Il numero tredici, fermata qui vicino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the historic center is safe to explore alone
phrases.text_local: Scusi, è sicuro girare da soli nei caruggi di sera?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, eh see-KOO-roh jee-RAH-reh dah SOH-lee nay kah-ROOD-jee dee SEH-rah?

responses.english: Daytime yes, evenings stick to the main lanes.
responses.phonetic: dee JOR-noh see, dee SEH-rah MEL-lyoh res-TAH-reh NEL-leh VEE-eh preen-chee-PAH-lee.
responses.french: Di giorno sì, di sera meglio restare nelle vie principali.
